notice: This is the public AI editing guide for Cht WebSheet (CWS) HTML workbooks. A CWS HTML workbook stores the real workbook data as JSON inside script#websheet-model. Edit only that JSON when changing workbook content.

identification.purpose: Use these markers to recognize whether an HTML file is a Cht WebSheet workbook.
identification.positiveMatchRule: Treat an HTML file as CWS when script#websheet-model exists and at least one explicit CWS marker exists.

confidence.high: script#websheet-model exists and html[data-cws-format] or meta[name=cws:format] exists.
confidence.medium: script#websheet-model and script#cws-ai-instructions exist, but html/meta markers are missing.
confidence.low: Only product text such as Cht WebSheet is found. Do not edit as CWS unless script#websheet-model is present.

concept.title: 人とAIが共に扱える、設計文書の新しい標準へ
concept.lead: CWS HTML 形式により、AI生成後の編集性・操作性・構造管理を高め、人とAIがより自然に設計意図を共有できるドキュメントインターフェースを提供します。
concept.dataNote: データ保存形式は JSON 形式です

editingRules: Edit only the JSON inside script#websheet-model when changing workbook content.
For CWS HTML 1.0 AI-editable files, script#websheet-model should contain the plain workbook object, not a top-level encoded gzip/base64 wrapper.

Image binary payloads may be stored separately in assets.images and may use dataEncoding gzip-base64. This does not change the rule that sheets, cells, formulas, styles, and image metadata remain plain JSON.
Do not rewrite the whole HTML file.
Do not edit runtime JavaScript, CSS, loader code, script attributes, meta tags, or external links unless the user explicitly asks for those changes.
Preserve unknown fields. CWS may add fields that are not listed in this guide.

Preserve existing ids, sheet names, formulas, images, shapes, drawings, hyperlinks, defined names, comments, notes, filters, tables, page layout, print ranges, and references unless the requested edit requires updating them.
Use 1-based row and column numbers. A1 is row 1, col 1. B2 is row 2, col 2.
Cell map keys use row:col form, such as 1:1 for A1 and 3:2 for B3.
Keep JSON valid. Do not leave comments, trailing commas, or unescaped control characters in JSON.
When adding data, update rowCount and colCount if the new content is outside the current sheet size.
When changing a merged range, keep the visible value and style in the top-left cell unless the user requests another layout.

workbook.description: The root JSON object inside script#websheet-model.

commonFields.version: Internal CWS workbook model version. Preserve it unless migrating the whole model.
commonFields.theme: Theme colors and font information when present.
commonFields.metadata: Additional CWS or imported Excel metadata. Preserve unknown values.

assets.description: Shared workbook assets. Image data may be stored here so sheet image objects can keep placement metadata readable while avoiding duplicated large payloads.

commonFields.images: Object map or array of reusable image assets. Sheet images can refer to entries by assetId.

imageAsset.description: Reusable image binary payload and metadata.

commonFields.mimeType: Image media type, such as image/png or image/webp.
commonFields.width: Intrinsic or optimized image width in pixels.
commonFields.height: Intrinsic or optimized image height in pixels.
commonFields.data: Base64 image bytes, or base64 gzip bytes when dataEncoding is gzip-base64.
commonFields.dataEncoding: Optional payload encoding. gzip-base64 means data is gzip-compressed image bytes encoded with base64.
commonFields.uncompressedByteLength: Original image byte count when known.

imageAsset.editingRule: Preserve image asset data exactly unless the user asks to replace, remove, or compress the image. AI agents can still edit workbook structure because image placement, dimensions, and references remain plain JSON.

commonFields.id: Stable sheet id. Preserve for existing sheets.
commonFields.name: Sheet tab name.
commonFields.rowCount: Maximum row count currently materialized or required.
commonFields.colCount: Maximum column count currently materialized or required.
commonFields.columns: Column settings array. columns[col - 1].width is pixel width. hidden and style fields may exist.
commonFields.rows: Row settings array. rows[row - 1].height is pixel height. hidden and style fields may exist.
commonFields.images: Image objects and imported picture-like objects.
commonFields.shapes: Shape objects. Some imported drawings may be stored in images or drawingObjects depending on the source.
commonFields.drawingObjects: Imported object container when present. Preserve existing structure.
commonFields.comments: Threaded comments when stored separately from cells.
commonFields.notes: Legacy notes when stored separately from cells.
commonFields.pageLayout: Print, paper, margin, page break, and page view settings.
commonFields.view: Zoom, freeze panes, gridline visibility, page break preview, and other view settings.

cell.description: One worksheet cell object. Store it in sheet.cells using a row:col key.

commonFields.raw: User-entered literal value. Use string, number, boolean, or null.
commonFields.formula: Formula text beginning with =, such as =SUM(A1:A3).
commonFields.display: Rendered display text. Keep consistent with raw or formula when possible.
commonFields.numberFormat: Excel-like display format, such as yyyy/mm/dd or #,##0.
commonFields.type: Optional value type, such as string, number, boolean, date, formula.
commonFields.richText: Runs for partial text styling. Preserve it when changing cell-level styles unless the user asks to replace all formatting.
commonFields.note: Legacy note / memo for this cell.
commonFields.comment: Threaded comment or comment reference for this cell.
commonFields.validation: Data validation attached directly to this cell.

styleFields.fontFamily: Font family, such as MS Pゴシック.
styleFields.fontSize: Font size, usually with pt suffix or px depending on existing data.
styleFields.fontWeight: normal, bold, or numeric string such as 700.
styleFields.textDecoration: underline, double-underline, line-through, or combined value when present.
styleFields.color: Text color. Use #RRGGBB when adding new values.

borderObject.style: solid, dashed, dotted, double, hair, medium, thick, or existing style value.
borderObject.width: Pixel width or imported width value.

richTextRun.css: Style only for this run. Do not delete existing runs when only changing cell-level layout.

merge.rule: The visible value should normally remain in the top-left cell.

image.description: A raster image or imported picture.

commonFields.name: Display name when present.
commonFields.src: data:image/...;base64,... or a URL that CWS can load.
commonFields.assetId: Reference to workbook.assets.images when the binary payload is stored as a reusable asset.

shape.description: A vector-like shape. Unsupported imported shapes may be preserved as fallback rectangles with original metadata.

commonFields.name: Display name.
commonFields.type: Shape type, such as rect, roundRect, ellipse, triangle, line, arrow, callout, cloudCallout, star, explosion, connector, freeform.
commonFields.text: Shape text. Use newline characters for line breaks.
commonFields.adjustments: Shape adjustment handles, such as callout pointer location or star depth.
commonFields.connectors: Connection info for line endpoints when present.

connector.description: A line or arrow that may connect to shapes or images.

commonFields.type: line, straightConnector, elbowConnector, curvedConnector, arrow, doubleArrow, etc.
commonFields.x1: Start x when stored as endpoints.
commonFields.y1: Start y when stored as endpoints.
commonFields.x2: End x when stored as endpoints.
commonFields.y2: End y when stored as endpoints.
commonFields.start: Start endpoint or connection object when present.
commonFields.end: End endpoint or connection object when present.
commonFields.startConnection: Connected object id and connection point when present.
commonFields.endConnection: Connected object id and connection point when present.

commonFields.points: Point array. Each point normally has x and y.
commonFields.tool: pen, highlighter, eraser, etc. when present.

autoFilter.description: Filter range and per-column filter conditions.

commonFields.fitToWidth: Fit to page width count when present.
commonFields.fitToHeight: Fit to page height count when present.
commonFields.margins: top, bottom, left, right, header, footer.
commonFields.pageBreaks: Manual horizontal and vertical page breaks.

styleCell.description: Apply fill, text color, bold, center alignment, and wrapping.

partialTextStyle.description: Use richText when only part of the cell text has special formatting.

addBorders.description: Apply solid borders to all sides.

addHyperlink.description: Add a hyperlink to a cell.

addComment.description: Add a threaded comment when the workbook uses cell-level comments.

addShape.description: Add a rectangle shape with text.

addConnector.description: Add a connector line or arrow. Preserve existing connection object structure if the file already uses one.

fallbackPolicy.unsupportedShape: If an imported Excel shape type is not recognized by CWS, preserve its original metadata and use a rectangle fallback for display. Do not delete originalPreset or imported raw drawing data.
fallbackPolicy.largeBinary: Do not regenerate image data unless the user asks to replace or compress the image.

prompt.title: 大規模言語モデル向けプロンプト例
lines: この HTML ファイルが Cht WebSheet（CWS）HTML か確認してから編集してください。
識別方法:
- script#websheet-model[type=application/json] が存在すること。
- さらに html[data-cws-format=CWS_HTML]、meta[name=cws:format]、script#cws-ai-instructions のいずれかが存在すること。
- meta[name=cws:guide] または script#cws-ai-instructions.guideUrl があれば、その URL の CWS guide も参照すること。
- meta[name=cws:schema] または script#cws-ai-instructions.schemaUrl があれば、その JSON Schema も参照すること。
編集してよい範囲:
- ワークブック内容を変更する場合、編集対象は script#websheet-model 内の JSON だけです。
- CWS HTML 1.0 の AI 編集用 profile では、script#websheet-model 全体を gzip/base64 にせず、明文の workbook JSON object にしてください。
- 画像の binary payload は assets.images に分離され、dataEncoding=gzip-base64 で圧縮される場合があります。セル、数式、書式、画像位置などの構造情報は明文 JSON のままです。
- HTML/CSS/JS runtime、loader、script タグ属性、meta タグ、外部リンクは変更しないでください。
- JSON として妥当な形式を維持し、未知フィールドは削除せず保持してください。
座標とセル:
- 行番号と列番号は 1 始まりです。A1 は row 1 / col 1、B2 は row 2 / col 2 です。
- sheet.cells のキーは row:col 形式です。A1 は 1:1、B3 は 3:2 です。
- セル値は raw、数式は formula、表示文字列は display、計算済み値は cached に保持します。
- セル書式は css、部分文字書式は richText、罫線は borders、リンクは hyperlink、メモは note、コメントは comment を使います。
シート要素:
- 結合セルは sheet.merges に {top,left,bottom,right} で保持します。値と主な書式は左上セルに置きます。
- 列幅は sheet.columns[col - 1].width、行高は sheet.rows[row - 1].height を使います。
- フィルターは autoFilter、テーブルは tables、入力規則は validations または cell.validation、印刷設定は pageLayout、表示状態は view を使います。
画像・図形・手書き:
- 画像は images に id、src または assetId、left、top、width、height、rotation、crop、zIndex を保持します。
- 図形は shapes または既存の drawing object 構造に、type、left、top、width、height、rotation、fill、stroke、strokeWidth、text、textStyle、adjustments、zIndex を保持します。
- 線・矢印・コネクタは endpoint または connection 情報を壊さず保持します。
- 手書き線は drawings に points、stroke、width、opacity を保持します。
- 未対応の Excel 図形は矩形 fallback で表示される場合がありますが、originalPreset や imported raw drawing data は削除しないでください。
変更例:
- B3 に値を書く: sheets[0].cells['3:2'] = { row:3, col:2, raw:'内容', display:'内容' }
- C3 に数式を書く: sheets[0].cells['3:3'] = { row:3, col:3, formula:'=SUM(A3:B3)', cached:0, display:'0' }
- A1:C1 を結合: sheets[0].merges.push({ top:1, left:1, bottom:1, right:3 })
- 背景色と文字色: cell.css.backgroundColor = '#D9EAF7'; cell.css.color = '#1F4E79'
- 画像追加: sheets[0].images.push({ id:'img-new-1', src:'data:image/png;base64,...', left:80, top:60, width:240, height:120, rotation:0 })
- 図形追加: sheets[0].shapes.push({ id:'shape-new-1', type:'rect', left:120, top:80, width:180, height:80, fill:'#D9EAF7', stroke:'#4472C4', strokeWidth:1, text:'説明' })
最後に、既存 id、シート名、数式参照、画像 data URL、図形接続、結合範囲、フィルター、印刷範囲を壊していないことを確認してください。
